settings.text: Every material we use is chosen for its natural beauty and authenticity. We don't hide imperfections — we celebrate them.

settings.title: Natural Pearls
settings.description: We use baroque and freshwater pearls — each one uniquely shaped by nature. You'll notice variations in form, size, and luster. That's not a flaw; it's proof of authenticity. Our pearls are selected for their organic beauty and soft, natural glow.

settings.title: Gemstones
settings.description: Amethyst, agate, quartz, tiger's eye, lapis lazuli — hand-cut and minimally polished. Each stone retains its natural texture, color variation, and inclusions. We source stones that show character, not factory uniformity.

settings.title: S925 Sterling Silver
settings.description: All metal components — clasps, spacers, logo tags — are crafted from S925 sterling silver. Hand-finished for a smooth feel against the skin, designed for daily wear and long-term durability.

settings.heading: No Two Pieces Are Ever Alike
settings.body_text: Because we use genuine natural materials, the color, texture, shape, and size of stones and pearls will vary from piece to piece. This is a feature, not a defect — it's what makes each bracelet uniquely yours.
